info.name: Geoloc API — Complete Collection
info.description:
# Geoloc API — Complete Postman Collection

A full test collection for the Geoloc hyper-local social media API.

## 🚀 Getting Started

1. **Start the infrastructure** — `docker compose up -d`
2. **Set variables** — Click the eye icon 👁️ and set:
   - `baseUrl`: `http://localhost:8080`
   - `accessToken`: _(leave empty — will be filled after login)_
3. **Authenticate** — Run `Auth > Register` or `Auth > Login`, then copy the `access_token` into the `accessToken` variable
4. **Explore!** — All requests are pre-configured with auth headers

## 📋 Collection Variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `baseUrl` | API base URL (default: `http://localhost:8080`) |
| `accessToken` | JWT access token (auto-filled after login) |
| `postId` | UUID of a created post (for child requests) |
| `userId` | UUID of a user (for follow/block etc.) |
| `commentId` | UUID of a comment (for replies/likes) |
| `geohash` | Geohash prefix for location operations |
| `notificationId` | UUID of a notification |
| `deviceToken` | FCM push notification token |
| `peerUserId` | UUID of DM peer (set manually or from another user) |
| `conversationId` | DM conversation UUID (auto-set by **Start Conversation**) |
| `messageId` | Last DM message UUID (auto-set by **Send Message**) |
| `dmCursor` | Pagination cursor from `next_cursor` on inbox/messages |

item.name: 🚦 Health & Readiness

request.description: Returns overall system health including Cassandra and Redis status.
Simple readiness probe — returns 200 when the server is accepting traffic.

item.description: Public endpoints for health checking and readiness probing.

item.name: 🔐 Auth (Public)

request.description: Register a new user account. Returns JWT tokens and sets the `accessToken` variable automatically.
Login with email or username. Automatically saves the returned `access_token` into the `accessToken` collection variable.
Login with username instead of email.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token. Replace the placeholder with an actual refresh token from a previous login.
Mobile-native Google sign-in. Send the ID token obtained from the Google Sign-In SDK on the client.
Mobile-native Apple Sign-in. Send the ID token from Apple's SDK. `full_name` is only provided on the very first sign-in.
Request a password reset. Always returns 200 (prevents email enumeration). The reset token is logged to server stdout in dev mode.
Reset password using a token received via email (or logged to stdout in dev mode). Token is a 64-character hex string.

item.description: Public authentication endpoints. No Bearer token required.

item.name: 📡 Feed & Geocode (Protected)

request.description: Get nearby posts using cursor-based pagination. The first request omits `cursor`. Use `next_cursor` from the response for subsequent pages.
Fetch the next page of the feed by passing the `next_cursor` value from the previous response.
Reverse geocode coordinates to a human-readable address using Nominatim.

item.description: Feed and geocoding endpoints. Requires JWT authentication.

request.description: Get the authenticated user's full profile.
Update the authenticated user's profile. All fields are optional — only send what you want to change.
⚠️ Irreversible. Requires password confirmation. All PII is anonymized (GDPR-compliant soft-delete).
Get a user's public profile by their UUID.
Get a user's public profile by their username.
Get posts by a specific user with cursor-based pagination.
Get posts that a user has liked.

item.name: 🔄 Follows (Protected)

request.description: Follow a user by their UUID.
Unfollow a user by their UUID.
Get a list of users who follow the specified user.
Get a list of users that the specified user follows.

item.description: Social graph — follow/unfollow users and list followers/following.

item.name: 🚫 Block / Mute (Protected)

request.description: Block a user. Blocked users are hidden from each other's feeds and cannot interact.
Unblock a previously blocked user.
Mute a user. Their content is hidden from your feed, but they can still interact with you.
Unmute a previously muted user.
List all users you have blocked.
List all users you have muted.

item.description: Content moderation — block/mute users and list blocked/muted accounts.

request.description: Create a new post with location. The `user_id` is inferred from the JWT token — do not send it in the body. Automatically saves the post ID into the `postId` variable.
Get a single post by its UUID. Includes author info and like state.
Delete your own post. Cascades to likes and comments.
Like a post.
Remove your like from a post.
Idempotent toggle: likes if not liked, unlikes if liked. Safe for unreliable networks.

item.name: 💬 Comments (Protected)

request.description: Add a comment to a post. Automatically saves the comment ID into the `commentId` variable.
Get all comments for a post.
Reply to a comment. Maximum nesting depth is 3 levels.
Get all replies to a specific comment.
Edit your own comment.
Delete your own comment.
Like a comment.
Remove your like from a comment.
Idempotent toggle for comment likes. Safe for unreliable networks.

item.description: Comment CRUD and like operations. Nested replies supported up to 3 levels.

item.name: 📍 Location Follows (Protected)

request.description: Follow a geographic area. You'll receive notifications when new posts are created nearby.
Unfollow a geographic area by its geohash prefix.
List all geographic areas you are following.

item.description: Follow/unfollow geographic areas to get notified about nearby posts.

item.name: 🔔 Notifications (Protected)

request.description: Get all notifications for the authenticated user. Use `?unread=true` to filter unread only.

⚠️ Long-lived SSE connection. Pushes in-app notifications (`sse:user:{id}`) and **DM events** (`dm:{id}`): `dm_new_message`, `dm_read_receipt`. Sets `sse:online:{id}` while connected. Keepalive every 30s. See docs/api/dm.md.
Get the count of unread notifications.
Mark a specific notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read.
Delete a specific notification.

item.description: In-app notification management including SSE real-time streaming.

item.name: 💬 Direct Messages (E2EE) (Protected)

request.description: Register or rotate your X25519 public key (base64). Re-uploading the same version+key is a no-op. Rate limit: 60/min.
Fetch the peer's current public key for ECDH before encrypting. Set `peerUserId` to another user's UUID.
Create or return the canonical 1:1 conversation. Requires `peerUserId`. Returns 403 if blocked.
Paginated inbox. Enable `cursor` query param and set `dmCursor` from a previous `next_cursor`.
Message history (newest first). Requires `conversationId`. Ciphertext is opaque to the server.

Send AES-256-GCM ciphertext (base64). `key_version` must match the **recipient's** current key. Placeholder body uses 17-byte ciphertext + 12-byte nonce. Real clients encrypt locally. Pushes to peer via Redis `dm:{id}` and optional Kafka `dm_messages`.
Update read receipt. Peer receives `dm_read_receipt` on SSE.
Soft-delete your own message. Requires `conversation_id` query param.

item.description: End-to-end encrypted direct messages. Server stores ciphertext only. Apply migrations/007_dm.cql. Docs: docs/api/dm.md. Typical order: Upload Public Key → set peerUserId → Start Conversation → Get Peer Public Key → Send Message → Mark Conversation Read.

item.name: 🔍 Search — Legacy Cassandra (Protected)

request.description: Legacy Cassandra-backed user search using SAI indexes. Min 2 characters.
Legacy Cassandra-backed post search using SAI indexes. Min 2 characters.

item.description: Legacy search endpoints backed by Cassandra SAI indexes. Still available as a fallback.

item.name: 🔍 Search — Elasticsearch (Protected, New)

request.description:
🔬 Elasticsearch full-text search across posts and users. Supports fuzzy matching and typo tolerance.

- `type`: `all`, `posts`, or `users` (default: `all`)
- Fans out to ES in parallel for both post and user queries
- Hydrates full objects from Cassandra using returned IDs
Search only posts using Elasticsearch with multi-match across content and hashtags.
Search only users using Elasticsearch with function_score (verified users boosted 1.5x), sorted by follower_count.

🔬 Geo-filtered full-text search. Results are re-ranked using:
- 50% ES relevance score
- 30% Recency (1 / (1 + hours_since_posted))
- 20% Proximity (1 / (1 + distance_km))

⚡ Real-time autocomplete for usernames (Redis ZRANGEBYLEX) and hashtags (ES aggregations).

- `type`: `all`, `users`, or `hashtags`
- Usernames: Redis sorted set prefix scan
- Hashtags: ES edge n-gram prefix + terms aggregation (sorted by doc count)
Username-only autocomplete. Hits Redis sorted set `users:autocomplete` using ZRANGEBYLEX.
Hashtag-only autocomplete. Queries ES posts index using prefix + terms aggregation, returning top 10 by doc count.

item.description: 🔬 New Elasticsearch-backed search endpoints. Requires Elasticsearch to be running together with the search-indexer worker.

request.description: Upload a profile avatar. Max 5MB. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP.
Upload media for a post. Max 50MB. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, MP4, MOV.

item.name: 📱 Devices & Push (Protected)

request.description: Register a device for push notifications. `platform` can be `ios` or `android`.
Unregister a device from push notifications.

item.description: Push notification device registration via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM).

item.name: 🚨 Content Moderation (Protected)

request.description:
Report a post, comment, or user for moderation review.

- `target_type`: `post`, `comment`, or `user`
- `reason`: `spam`, `harassment`, `inappropriate`, or `other`

item.description: Content reporting for moderation. Reports are reviewed by the team.
